speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Shopping and gifts
questions: What is the last thing you bought?
Did you give anyone a gift recently?
What did you think of the price?
speaking.sampleAnswer: The last thing I bought was a bag. Yes, I gave my sister a gift last month. I thought the price was quite reasonable.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Describe a historical place

cueCard.topic: Describe a historical place you visited.
bullets: what you found or saw there
and explain why it was interesting

speaking.sampleAnswer: I would like to talk about an old museum. People built it about a hundred years ago. I found some old photographs and letters inside. It was interesting because the exhibition began just before my visit.
